status_filter: Ready for Testing or On Production

renderedFields.description:
Develop endpoints for single session logout (revoke sid), and password change hooks (bump tokenVersion and revoke refresh family).

The main problem that must solved is revoking active JWT access tokens: for that you should investigate the solution and implement something from:

  • Storing revoked tokens in memory via Kafka conusmer
  • Storing Refresh token ID hash in JWT access token, and storing in memory the hash of revoked refresh token session
  • … something else?

Solution. Every JWT has client_session_id claim which is validated in ClientApiGateway and WebsiteWebApi on every jwt validation. If Password was changed (or client was limited from accessing the system by admin somehow) than logout for a client happens and ClientLogoutFromSessionEvent is published which is consumed by WWA and CliGateway to handled in-memory list of removed client_session_id

fields.summary: [5] Implement logout and forced logout endpoints in WWA

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

content.text: Develop endpoints for single session logout (revoke sid), and password change hooks (bump tokenVersion and revoke refresh family).
The main problem that must solved is revoking active JWT access tokens: for that you should investigate the solution and implement something from:
Storing revoked tokens in memory via Kafka conusmer
Storing Refresh token ID hash in JWT access token, and storing in memory the hash of revoked refresh token session

Solution. Every JWT has client_session_id claim which is validated in ClientApiGateway and WebsiteWebApi on every jwt validation. If Password was changed (or client was limited from accessing the system by admin somehow) than logout for a client happens and
ClientLogoutFromSessionEvent is published which is consumed by WWA and CliGateway to handled in-memory list of removed client_session_id

renderedFields.description:
Priority

High

Brand name

Tura

Environment

Бонус ID: 11368

В депозитных триггерах бонусов параметр Max Amount Multiplier не сохраняется после настройки.

Из-за этого ограничитель максимального выигрыша не применяется, и после завершения вейджеринга весь бонусный баланс переводится на реальный баланс, игнорируя установленное ограничение.

Проблема наблюдается на всех бонусах.

Version: Device or system version

-

Precondition(s)

-

User: username

None

Steps to Reproduce (STR)

  1. Открыть Backoffice
  2. Перейти в настройки бонуса с депозитным триггером
  3. Установить значение параметра Max Amount Multiplier
  4. Сохранить настройки бонуса

 

Actual results

  • Значение Max Amount Multiplier не сохраняется
  • Ограничение максимального выигрыша не применяется
  • После завершения вейджеринга весь бонусный баланс переводится на реальный баланс

 

Expected Result (EXR)

  • Параметр Max Amount Multiplier должен корректно сохраняться
  • Ограничитель должен применяться при завершении вейджеринга

 

Severity

None

Reproducibility

None

L1 Checked

Відтворити в себе помилку не вдалось

renderedFields.description:
Currently, when the system receives an HTTP 404 (Not Found) response while requesting a file, the UI remains in an infinite loading state.

We need to properly handle the 404 error and display a user-friendly error message instead of showing the loader indefinitely.

fields.summary: Handle 404 Error and Display "File Not Found" Message Instead of Infinite Loading

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

content.text: Currently, when the system receives an HTTP 404 (Not Found) response while requesting a file, the UI remains in an infinite loading state.
We need to properly handle the 404 error and display a user-friendly error message instead of showing the loader indefinitely.

renderedFields.description:
Description:

There are multiple inconsistencies in how the frontend handles permission-related errors during CSV export.

Two types of issues were identified:

1. Error Without Description

The UI shows an error state, but the backend Description field is not displayed to the user.

Example backend response:

"Description": "DontHavePermission: Missing permission 'CreateReport' for partnerIds: '2'"

However:

  • The frontend shows only a generic error
  • The permission explanation is not visible
  • The user does not understand the root cause

2. No Error Displayed (Silent Failure)

The backend returns a permission-related error, but:

  • No error message is shown in UI
  • No explanation is displayed
  • Export simply does not work

This creates confusion and breaks UX consistency.

Affected Areas

Below is the list of sections where the issue occurs.

Reports Tab

Section Endpoint Issue Type
By Game Activity mgw/report/secureapi/Background/Create/GameActivityReport Error without description
By Games mgw/report/secureapi/Background/Create/InternetGamesReport Error without description
By Clients mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportClientsInfoList No permission error displayed
By Bonuses mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportReportByBonuses No permission error displayed
By Bonuses Details mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportReportBonusDetail No permission error displayed
By Partners mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportReportByPartners No permission error displayed
By Products mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportProducts No permission error displayed
By Corrections mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportReportByCorrections No permission error displayed
By User Logs mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportByUserLogs No permission error displayed
By Sessions mgw/report/secureapi/Export/ExportClientSessions No permission error displayed

Payments

Section Endpoint Issue Type
Deposits mgw/admin/api/Partner/ExportPartnersModel Error without description
Withdrawals mgw/admin/api/Report/GetPaymentRequestsReport Error without description

Clients Dashboard

Section Endpoint Issue Type
Deposits mgw/admin/api/Report/GetPaymentRequestsReport Error without description
Withdrawals mgw/admin/api/Report/GetPaymentRequestsReport Error without description
Casino Bets mgw/report/secureapi/Background/Create/InternetBetsReport Error without description
Accounts History mgw/report/secureapi/Background/Create/AccountHistoryRequestsReport Error without description
Clients mgw/admin/api/Client/ExportClients No permission error displayed

Segments

Section Endpoint Issue Type
Segments mgw/admin/api/Segment/ExportSegments No permission error displayed

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Log in with a user that does not have CreateReport permission.
  2. Navigate to any of the affected sections listed above.
  3. Click Export to CSV.
  4. Observe:
    • UI behavior
    • Error message (or lack of it)
    • Network response payload

Actual Result:

  • Some sections show generic error without backend description.
  • Some sections show no error at all.
  • Permission-related error message is not consistently displayed.
  • No unified error handling behavior.

Expected Result:

  • Backend Description field must always be displayed when present.
  • Permission errors must clearly state missing permission.

fields.summary: Inconsistent Permission Error Handling for CSV Export Across Multiple Sections (Missing or No Error Message)

issuetype.description: A problem or error.
issuetype.name: Bug

content.text: There are multiple inconsistencies in how the frontend handles permission-related errors during CSV export.
Two types of issues were identified:
The UI shows an error state, but the backend Description field is not displayed to the user.
The frontend shows only a generic error
The permission explanation is not visible
The user does not understand the root cause
The backend returns a permission-related error, but:
No error message is shown in UI
This creates confusion and breaks UX consistency.
Below is the list of sections where the issue occurs.
Log in with a user that does not have CreateReport permission.
Navigate to any of the affected sections listed above.
Some sections show generic error without backend description.
Some sections show no error at all.
Permission-related error message is not consistently displayed.
Backend Description field must always be displayed when present.
Permission errors must clearly state missing permission.

renderedFields.description:
Priority

High

Brand name

All Brands
Проблему треба вирішити як на цис так і на інтернешенал
Не тільки для мотору

Environment

  • Source (Backoffice): Reports → Business Intelligence → By Corrections
  • Target: Analytics DB / DWH (table/view used by analysts for corrections)

 

Version: Device or system version

no matter

Precondition(s)

  • User has access to Backoffice with permissions to create manual balance corrections and view Reports → Business Intelligence → By Corrections.
  • Access to the Analytics DB/DWH (or an internal analytics tool/dataset) is available to verify the correction record.

 

User: username

None

Steps to Reproduce (STR)

  • Create a manual balance correction in Backoffice and fill Info with a unique text (e.g., INFO_TEST_12345).
  • Open Backoffice → Reports → Business Intelligence → By Corrections for the same date range.
  • Verify the created correction is present and Info contains INFO_TEST_12345.
  • In Analytics DB, find the same correction record (by ExternalTransactionId / ClientId / CreationTime).
  • Check the Info field in the analytics dataset.

 

Actual results

"Info “is empty / NULL in Analytics DB.

 

Expected Result (EXR)

After a manual balance correction is created with the Info field filled in Backoffice, the Info value should be persisted and propagated to the Analytics DB/DWH.
When analysts query the corresponding correction record in the analytics dataset (by ExternalTransactionId / ClientId / CreationTime), the Info column should contain the same text as shown in Backoffice → Reports → Business Intelligence → By Corrections, not be empty/NULL.

Severity

None

Reproducibility

always

L1 Checked

В БО колонка Info заповнена.

Додатково в коментарях кастомер уточнив

“Проблему треба вирішити як на цис так і на інтернешенал“

renderedFields.description:
Goal / Business Objective

Restrict data export in BO to users with explicit export permissions.
Separate access into:

  • data viewing (read-only);
  • data generation and export.

Goal: prevent uncontrolled export of client, financial, and operational data.

Current functionality:

  • Report_View permission allows:
    • viewing reports;
    • generating reports;
    • file download;
    • background reports (generated CSV).
  • Clients_View in Client List permissions allows:
    • viewing clients;
    • exporting client base (instant CSV).

Expected functionality:

Permissions

  • Report_View:
    • read-only access;
    • no export;
    • no file generation;
    • no background reports.
  • Report_Create:
    • single permission for any export:
      • generated CSV;
      • Export CSV;

Export-restricted BO sections

Export must be blocked without Report_Create on the following BO pages:

  • Clients List
  • Segments
  • Client Identities (KYC)
  • Partners
  • Payments
  • Reports

(And any other BO sections where export functionality exists)

User Story

As a BO Admin
I want data export in BO to be available only to users with Report_Create permission
So that access to mass data extraction is controlled and data leakage risks are minimized.

Acceptance Criteria:

  1. User with Report_View / “Section(any section in BO)”_View:
    • can view data;
    • cannot export;
    • cannot generate CSV;
    • cannot create background reports;
    • cannot download generated files.
  2. User with Report(Section in BO)_View + Report(Section in BO)_Create + domain-view permission:
    • can view data;
    • can export data;
    • can create background reports;
    • can download generated files.

Note: Section(any section in BO)_View = загальний domain-view permission для будь-якого розділу BO з можливістю експорту. Section - абстрактний плейсхолдер, щоб не дублювати окремі пермішени для кожної сторінки.

Tech notes:

  • Для будь-якого місця в БО для того щоб завантажити файл з ріпортом (файл csv) потрібен пермішн CreateReport, а також той пермішн який дозволяє бачити це місце (ріпорт, грід, сторінка) в БО.
  • Для всіх роутів які дозволяють робити експорт csv, а також роутів які дозволяють створювати бекграунд ріпорти потрібно додати перевірку CreateReport пермішн до існуючої перевірки виконання існуючої дії, наприклад ViewClient/ViewPaymen etc.
  • Реалізовувати потрібно за допомогою PermissionNameOverrides (таблиця в пермішн сервісі).

Для будь-якого місця в БО для того щоб завантажити файл з ріпортом (файл csv) потрібен пермішн CreateReport, а також той пермішн який дозволяє бачити це місце (ріпорт, грід, сторінка) в БО.

Для всіх роутів які дозволяють робити експорт csv, а також роутів які дозволяють створювати бекграунд ріпорти потрібно додати перевірку CreateReport пермішн до існуючої перевірки виконання існуючої дії, наприклад ViewClient/ViewPaymen etc.

renderedFields.description:
Brand

Motor

Priority

Normal

Request Type

Other

User / Target Info

-

System / Platform

Strapi

Justification / Reason

Problem Statement: На текущий момент для провайдера Pragmatic Play в поле Default Square Thumbnail приходят изображения с горизонтальной ориентацией. Поскольку сайт ожидает в этом поле квадратное изображение, картинки отображаются на фронтенде некорректно (обрезаются). При этом в поле Default Horizontal Thumbnail приходит корректное изображение нужного формата.

Objective: Для игр провайдера Pragmatic Play необходимо изменить логику выбора основного изображения, чтобы избежать визуальных дефектов на сайте.

Acceptance Criteria (Варианты решения):

  1. Вариант А (Приоритетный): Перенастроить маппинг при синхронизации игр (Game Sync). Сделать так, чтобы данные, которые сейчас попадают в Default Horizontal Thumbnail, записывались/дублировались в поле, отвечающее за основной вывод на сайте.
  2. Вариант Б (Логика отображения): Изменить приоритет выбора картинки на фронтенде или в API. Если провайдер = Pragmatic Play, то в качестве основного изображения использовать значение из параметра Default Horizontal Thumbnail вместо Default Square Thumbnail.
  3. Вариант В (Универсальный): Изменить путь получения данных от провайдера, чтобы в Default Square Thumbnail изначально приходил корректный ассет (если это позволяет API провайдера).

Technical Notes:

  • Изменения должны затрагивать только провайдера Pragmatic Play.
  • Поля помеченные как "DO NOT CHANGE" (на скриншоте) перезаписываются во время Game Sync, поэтому фикс должен быть реализован на уровне процесса синхронизации или логики отображения, а не ручной правки в БД.

fields.summary: CLONE - Изменить стандартный путь картинок на игры по провайдеру Pragmatic Play

renderedFields.description:
Brand name

KhelKaro

Priority

High

Environment

Any

Version: Device or system version

Any

Precondition(s)

  1. User is logged in to BO with access to Segments
  2. Existing users with different deposit counts and last deposit dates are present in the system

 

User: username

Any BO user with Segments access

Steps to Reproduce (STR)

  1. Log in to BO
  2. Navigate to Segments
  3. Open an existing segment or create a new one
  4. Set Mode = Complex
  5. Configure filters:
    • Period Deposits Count:
      • Time period: All Time
      • Operation: IsEqualTo
      • Value: 3
    • Last Deposit Date:
      • Operation: IsGreaterThen
      • Value: 7
      • Operation: IsLessThen
      • Value: 31
  6. Save the segment
  7. Open the segment user list and review included users

 

Actual results

The segment includes users who:

  • have exactly 3 deposits
  • but whose last deposit date ranges from today (0 days ago) up to 30+ days ago

Users with a last deposit made today or within the last 7 days are incorrectly included,
despite the IsGreaterThen = 7 condition being set.

Expected Result (EXR)

The segment should include ONLY users who:

  • have exactly 3 deposits (all time)
  • and whose last deposit was made between 8 and 30 days ago

Users with a last deposit date less than or equal to 7 days ago
should NOT be included in the segment.

The segment should work dynamically for both existing users
and users who meet these conditions in the future.

Severity

None

Reproducibility

Always

L1 checked:

Як приклад ID сегмента 1429 та клієнта 1138509, депозит за 10.02 але він потрапив у сегмент

fields.summary: CLONE - Segment filters work incorrectly for Last Deposit Date in Complex mode

but whose last deposit date ranges from today (0 days ago) up to 30+ days ago
Users with a last deposit made today or within the last 7 days are incorrectly included,
despite the IsGreaterThen = 7 condition being set.
The segment should include ONLY users who:
and whose last deposit was made between 8 and 30 days ago
Users with a last deposit date less than or equal to 7 days ago
should NOT be included in the segment.
The segment should work dynamically for both existing users
and users who meet these conditions in the future.

, депозит за 10.02 але він потрапив у сегмент

renderedFields.description:
Priority

High

Brand name

Ganamax

Environment

  • Platform: Web / Mobile Web
  • Auth method: Registration / Login via phone number

 

Version: Device or system version

Any (not device/OS specific)

Precondition(s)

  • User is on Registration or Login modal
  • OTP authentication via phone number is selected

 

User: username

None

Steps to Reproduce (STR)

Case 1 (without phone number):

  1. Open Registration/Login form.
  2. Leave the phone number field empty.
  3. Click “Enviar”.

→ A countdown timer for the next OTP attempt appears (button reacts).

Case 2 (with phone number entered):

  1. Enter a valid phone number.
  2. Click “Enviar” to request OTP via SMS.

 

Actual results

 

  • The Enviar button remains active.
  • No OTP SMS is sent.
  • No visible validation or error message is shown to the user.
  • In Network, a GraphQL request fails with status FAIL and problem code 524.

GraphQL response:

{
  data: {
    otpRequest: {
      record: null,
      status: "FAIL",
      problems: [
        {
          message: "OperationTemporarilyBlocked",
          problemCode: "524",
          traceId: null
        }
      ],
      __typename: "OtpRequestPayload"
    }
  }
}

 

Expected Result (EXR)

OTP SMS should be sent successfully,

Severity

None

Reproducibility

None

Підкажіть, будь ласка, обмеження на 5 разів встановлено на який проміжок часу?
Також хочемо підкреслити, що 5 разів до цього ОТП не приходило. Чи можемо якось це перевірити з вашого боку?

fields.summary: CLONE - OTP request fails with 524 error when phone number is entered – "Enviar" button remains active and no SMS is sent

→ A countdown timer for the next OTP attempt appears (button reacts).

renderedFields.description:
Implement a new endpoint in TransactionBetV2Controller that accepts a list of transactions (both credit and debit) and executes them in order of defined priority.
All operations must be executed atomically — meaning all succeed or all fail (rollback on any error).
Acceptance Criteria:

1. New endpoint

2. Processing logic

  • Transactions are processed in ascending order of priority.
    If multiple items have the same priority, process them in the order they appear in the list.
  • For each transaction:
    • If type == credit → apply the same logic as CreditBonusAsync.
    • If type == debit → apply the same logic as /api/v2/transaction/bet/debit.
  • All transactions are executed within a single database transaction
  1. Write integration tests on new endpoint
  2. Use this endpoint for Interanal Integration in PM
